allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const c = fs.readFileSync\('pixeloasis-plugin/scripts/capabilities/capability-labels.js','utf8'\); const m = c.match\(/EXPECTED_CAPABILITY_IDS\\s*=\\s*\\[\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\];/\); if\(m\) console.log\(m[1].split\(','\).filter\(l=>l.includes\('\\"'\)\).length\)")
